revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ambox globe current red]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ambox globe current red]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:21:58 on [[Template:Ambox globe current red]]
revision.text: {{Ambox globe |europe-africa = Ambox current red.svg |americas = Ambox current red Americas.svg |asia-australia = Ambox current red Asia Australia.svg }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Ambox globe current red]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{Ambox globe |europe-africa = Ambox current red.svg |americas = Ambox current red Americas.svg |asia-australia = Ambox current red Asia Australia.svg }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding {{pp-template}} | [[WP:TW|TW]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{Ambox globe |europe-africa = Ambox current red.svg |americas = Ambox current red Americas.svg |asia-australia = Ambox current red Asia Australia.svg }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>{{Ambox globe
|europe-africa  = Ambox current red.svg
|americas       = Ambox current red Americas.svg
|asia-australia = Ambox current red Asia Australia.svg
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>{{Ambox globe
|europe-africa  = Ambox current red.svg
|americas       = Ambox current red Americas.svg
|asia-australia = Ambox current red Asia Australia.svg

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ambox_globe_current_red here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ambox_globe_current_red for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>{{Ambox globe |europe-africa = Ambox current red.svg |americas = Ambox current red Americas.svg |asia-australia = Ambox current red Asia Australia.svg }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
